summary: Extended tests/shims/claude with deterministic no-scenario handling for --version and plugin list while preserving scenario-driven runner behavior.

items.statement: Added no-scenario dispatch for Claude --version and plugin list JSON.
items.rationale: Matches planned doctor test surface and preserves scenario branch.

items.statement: Focused shim and runner smoke passed in subagent.
items.rationale: Commands directly cover new shim path and existing scenario behavior.

summary: Updated user-facing docs for init-installed templates and Claude command parity.

items.statement: Documented default init template install, --no-agents, conflict preflight, and Claude command parity.
Docs-side parity, manifest, and whitespace checks passed in subagent.
items.rationale: Relevant docs and metadata checks were green.

verification.command: npm run check:parity && npm run check:manifests

summary: One cross-provider manifest parity concern was raised and rejected after parent review.

items.statement: Provider-specific doctors are coupled to all present Quest manifest versions.
items.rationale: Codex doctor already enforced package/codex/claude manifest parity before this change, and check:manifests treats all manifests as a single release unit. Keeping the global version-sync check is intentional release hygiene, not a regression from this work.

verification.evidence: passed in reviewer report and parent rerun

summary: Accepted shim fidelity and coverage findings; parent patched them.

items.statement: Claude shim plugin list should model the real id-based shape.
items.rationale: Patched shim to emit id: quest@quest.

items.statement: Claude installer needed mixed create+conflict atomicity coverage.
items.rationale: Added Claude atomicity test and init conflict partial-write assertion.

items.statement: init --no-agents needed reviewer absence assertions too.
items.rationale: Added absence assertions for both executor and reviewer templates for both providers.

summary: Accepted docs recovery, nested-store caveat, and symlink overwrite findings; parent patched them.

items.statement: Conflict recovery docs omitted rerunning quest init after force-installing templates.
items.rationale: Docs now say to run provider install with --force only if intended, then rerun quest init.

items.statement: Nested store docs needed to explain repo-root project template install.
items.rationale: Docs now describe repo-root project templates and QUEST_DIR guidance for nested stores.

items.statement: Installer could write through symlinked agent dirs/files.
items.rationale: Installer now refuses symlinked provider/agents dirs and agent files, including with --force; tests cover symlinked file target.
